title: Pillars of a Compliant GDP System
alt: Five pillars of a compliant Good Distribution Practice system

items.label: Quality Management System
items.desc: Documented QMS with CAPA, change control, ICH Q9/Q10 risk management

items.label: Responsible Person
items.desc: Empowered, trained RP with named deputy and clear authority

items.label: Premises & Equipment
items.desc: Qualified, mapped storage with segregation of returns and recalls

items.label: Controlled Cold Chain
items.desc: Qualified packaging and continuous monitoring across every leg

items.label: Data Integrity
items.desc: ALCOA+ records, traceability and bona fides verification
